'''wachuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadbuilding|roadbuilding]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadbuilding|roadbuilding]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wachuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæchichith|wæchichith]] || [[word:wæchichij|wæchichij]] || [[word:wæchichish|wæchichish]] || [[word:wæchichi|wæchichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachuchuchuth|wachuchuchuth]] || [[word:wachuchuchuj|wachuchuchuj]] || [[word:wachuchuchush|wachuchuchush]] || [[word:wachuchuchu|wachuchuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachuchuth|wachuchuth]] || [[word:wachuchuj|wachuchuj]] || [[word:wachuchush|wachuchush]] || [[word:wachuchu|wachuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachufchufth|wachufchufth]] || [[word:wachufchufj|wachufchufj]] || [[word:wachufchufsh|wachufchufsh]] || [[word:wachufchuf|wachufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wachuchuthu|wachuchuthu]] || [[word:wachuchuju|wachuchuju]] || [[word:wachuchushu|wachuchushu]] || [[word:wachuchuku|wachuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wachuchuth|wachuchuth]] || [[word:wachuchuj|wachuchuj]] || [[word:wachuchush|wachuchush]] || [[word:wachuchu|wachuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wachuchuthul|wachuchuthul]] || [[word:wachuchujul|wachuchujul]] || [[word:wachuchushul|wachuchushul]] || [[word:wachuchukul|wachuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wachuchuuthuthu|wachuchuuthuthu]] || [[word:wachuchuujuju|wachuchuujuju]] || [[word:wachuchuushushu|wachuchuushushu]] || [[word:wachuchuuku|wachuchuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wachuchuthun|wachuchuthun]] || [[word:wachuchujun|wachuchujun]] || [[word:wachuchushun|wachuchushun]] || [[word:wachuchukun|wachuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wachuchuthuoro|wachuchuthuoro]] || [[word:wachuchujuoro|wachuchujuoro]] || [[word:wachuchushuoro|wachuchushuoro]] || [[word:wachuchukuoro|wachuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
